name_en: Top-tier Replica [Exclusive Photo N40638 Pink] For the Damierlicious special edition, the Victorine wallet is crafted in Damier canvas with a sweet and soft color palette. It brings a fresh and gentle touch to this compact wallet. The envelope-style flap is adorned with a gold-engraved button. Inside, there are pockets for bills and coins, as well as six card slots. size:12x9.5x1.5cm
